turns.name: JUSTICE POWELL
turns.text: In the second of these cases, Bowen against the United States, No. 73-6848. We hold that the search -- we hold that the ruling in the previous case does not apply retroactively to searches that occurred before the date of the decision in Almeida-Sanchez. Mr. Justice Douglas, Mr. Justice Brennan, and Mr. Justice Marshall filed dissenting statements. Mr. Justice Stewart dissented.
